title: EndpointType+BodyType manual serde duplicates boilerplate
description: EndpointType (lines 189-200) and BodyType (lines 563-578) have structurally identical Serialize/Deserialize impls: serialize calls s.serialize_str(self.as_str()); deserialize reads a String then delegates to a from_uri/from_str constructor. This is 24 lines of duplicated boilerplate. Suggested rewrite: extract a macro (e.g. impl_string_enum!) generating as_str(), from_str(), Serialize, Deserialize, and Display from a variant-to-wire-string mapping. Both enums become single invocations.
close_reason: Valid polish; deferred. Tracked in follow-up bead jmap-chat-tui-yw6v or standalone.
